Tools API Reference

This document provides detailed API reference for the tools system in Agent Patterns.

Core Components

BaseToolProvider

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - get_tools
    - execute_tool
    - get_tool
    - list_tools

Tool

handler: python
selection:
  members:
    - __init__
    - to_dict
    - get_schema
    - validate_params
